ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the RingCentral account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., enterprise, small business) */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Billing cycle (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "billing_contact" TEXT /* Primary contact for billing */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Primary contact for support */,
  "is_suspended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the account is suspended */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for suspension */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_numbers" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RingCentral account the phone number belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The actual phone number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the phone number (e.g., active, inactive, reserved) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the user or department the phone number is assigned to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the phone number was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the phone number was last updated */,
  "number_type" TEXT /* Type of the phone number (e.g., landline, mobile) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the phone number */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the phone number is located */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Usage type (e.g., business, personal) */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Last date the phone number was used */,
  "call_forwarding_number" TEXT /* Number to which calls are forwarded */,
  "voicemail_number" TEXT /* Voicemail number */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Extension number */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the phone number */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_numbers_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RingCentral account the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* ID of the account being accessed */,
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phone number being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the log entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_phone_id FOREIGN KEY ("phone_id") REFERENCES phone_numbers ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the RingCentral account the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., call_forwarding, voicemail) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the setting was last updated */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is a default setting */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the setting */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_settings_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
